title: Recursive CTE syntax error at or near "USING"
description:
### What happens?

Getting a parse error when attempting to run the example code for [USING KEY](https://duckdb.org/docs/stable/sql/query_syntax/with#example-using-key).

```shell
Parser Error:
syntax error at or near "USING"

LINE 1: WITH RECURSIVE tbl(a, b) USING KEY (a) AS (
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
WITH RECURSIVE tbl(a, b) USING KEY (a) AS (
    SELECT a, b
    FROM (VALUES (1, 3), (2, 4)) t(a, b)
        UNION
    SELECT a + 1, b
    FROM tbl
    WHERE a < 3
)
SELECT *
FROM tbl;
```

### OS:

Windows

### DuckDB Version:

1.2.2

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
WITH RECURSIVE seq(n) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT n + 1 FROM seq WHERE n < 5) SELECT * FROM seq;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.value FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id + 1;
key_bug_features: Recursive CTE using KEY syntax causes parse error
